title: The Dimplex Rechargeable Cordless Desk Fan is a good go-anywhere fan, but you might want to play some music to drown out its drone
description: This Dimplex fan is very portable and runs for up to 15 hours on battery, but it's a little noisy if you're sitting close to it

title: The new Blink Outdoor 2K+ is a sharper budget camera to protect your property, with one frustrating catch
description: The latest iteration of Amazon's tough little cam offers very impressive battery life, but its Sync Module Core no longer allows you to connect USB storage.

title: Shark’s PowerDetect UV Reveal has a lot of potential, but right now it’s the equivalent of a power washer in the hands of a caveman
description: Narwal’s 2026 flagship robot vacuum is outfitted with video cameras and super smart AI cleaning technology to work out the best way to tackle your home.

title: The Ninja AutoBarista Pro Fully Automatic Espresso Machine lets you make just about any coffee creation you can imagine
description: Create just about any hot or iced coffee creation you'd like with the touch of a button.

title: With the second-gen Ring Battery Video Doorbell Plus, the head-to-toe doorbell finally goes 2K
description: The latest version of Ring's wireless video doorbell is a big step up rather than a minor refresh, and a great pick if you're not put off by the subscription fee.

title: The Yale Linus Smart Lock L2 Lite is a clever, affordable Matter lock with no subscription fee, but a few rough edges
description: A renter-friendly smart lock that plays nicely with all the main smart home platforms, once you've navigated the instruction manual.

title: The Dyson Supersonic Travel is proof you don't have to sacrifice hair health on holiday
description: Almost all of the Dyson power and performance for half the price in a third of the size

title: The Dreame AirStyle Era is the Airwrap alternative that nearly has it all
description: I tested Dreame's most ambitious multi-styler yet, and while the curls impressed, a few familiar frustrations refused to budge.

title: Cuisinart Power Blend Immersion Blender review
description: The Cuisinart Power Blend Immersion Blender offers a range of impressive attachments that will help you free up some valuable kitchen cupboard space.

title: The Blueair Mini Restful Sunrise Alarm Clock and Air Purifier is the smartest thing I've put on my nightstand this year
description: We put Blueair's first-ever sleep-focused purifier to the test to see if combining an air purifier, sunrise alarm and wake-up light in a single bedside device is too good to be true.

title: The Dyson HushJet Mini Cool is the powerful personal fan you won't want to live without this summer — and it's surprisingly reasonably priced, too
description: Wear it, hold it, or keep it on your desk — this stylish portable fan will keep you cool anywhere your summer takes you.

title: Keurig's K-Mini Mate is a no-frills compact coffee maker that packs a serious flavor punch
description: At just four inches wide, the K-Mini Mate is Keurig's smallest brewer yet, but still manages to deliver the bold flavours we've come to expect from the brand's coffee makers — for less than $100.

title: With 4G connectivity in addition to the usual Wi-Fi, the IMOU AOV PT is the ideal security camera for large properties
description: No Wi-Fi signal? No problem — this solid security camera has you covered, with solar charging and optional on-board storage for your videos as well.

title: The Shark Powerdetect Speed delivers superb cleaning in short bursts, and with a mess-reducing auto-empty dock, it's superb value
description: As a convenient cleaner for short cleans the Shark PowerDetect Speed is as good as they come, especially at this price.

title: The Keurig K-Crema high-pressure coffee maker produces creamy, smooth brews with speed and ease
description: The first Keurig machine with PressureInfusion Technology, the K-Crema is a game-changer for lovers of smooth, flavorful brews.

title: The Dyson HushJet Compact Air Purifier is powerful, quiet, and proof that good things do come in small(ish) packages
description: We put Dyson's smallest-ever purifier to the test to see if its jet engine-inspired technology can still deliver whole-room purification despite its compact size.
